## Problem Statement
Describe the current problem or limitation.

## Proposed Solution
Describe your proposed solution.

## Alternatives Considered
Describe alternative approaches you considered.

## Scope
- Affected role(s):
- Affected module(s):
- API changes required: yes/no
- UI changes required: yes/no

- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Additional Context
Links, screenshots, or references.
